accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified facts: BLM rule, Nov 20, 2024 issuance, June 25, 2025 GAO letter, and Dec 11, 2025 enactment.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details (CRA, BLM, dates, GAO letter) are accurate and drawn directly from the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Summary clearly states the bill disapproves a BLM rule under the Congressional Review Act, nullifying it.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Summary explains the resolution nullifies the BLM RMP amendment rule, giving it no force or effect, which is the operative legal change.

exceptions_conditions.why: This simple CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions, conditions, or carve-outs.

effective_dates.why: Summary correctly notes the resolution was approved December 11, 2025, matching the bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the BLM rule under the CRA.

objective_tone.why: Summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Summary is well-organized, internally consistent, and reads clearly.

concise.why: Summary is brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Bureau of Land Management, GAO, and the Congressional Review Act.

correct_figures.why: All dates stated (Nov 20, 2024; June 25, 2025; June 26, 2025; Dec 11, 2025) match the bill text exactly.
